_profile_notes.description: Single-person flat in Hamburg. Low electricity use, minimal heating demand (well-insulated modern flat), rarely drives. Small north-east facing balcony roof (converted top-floor flat) with heavy shading. Higher loan rate reflects shorter credit history. Unlikely to see strong savings from any upgrade.
_profile_notes.electricity_kwh: 1,500 kWh/yr — single person, energy-efficient appliances, no AC
_profile_notes.heating_kwh: 4,500 kWh gas — small 55 m² well-insulated flat, district-heat-like demand
_profile_notes.mileage_km: 4,000 km/yr — mostly cycles or uses public transport
_profile_notes.roof: 12 m² usable, north-east orientation, 20° tilt, 40% shading from adjacent buildings — severely limited PV potential
_profile_notes.financing: 10 yr @ 6.5% — shorter term, higher rate, reflects smaller loan appetite
